nav.migration.desc: Choose what moves to the new PC
migration.title: What should we keep before formatting?
migration.subtitle: Choose what you want to carry to the new PC. Every row states honestly what will happen.
migration.promise.restore.title: ✓ What we can carry
migration.promise.restore.body: Files, settings, game saves, and a list of programs to reinstall.
migration.promise.manual.title: ✗ What needs your action
migration.promise.manual.body: Programs themselves and credentials locked to this PC require reinstall or sign-in.
migration.scan.title: Read-only scan
migration.scan.running: Reading program and profile sources. Nothing is being changed.
migration.scan.error: The scan could not finish. Nothing was changed; you can retry.
migration.scan.profile.pending: The profile is confirmed when the on-demand scan starts.
migration.groups.heading: The most critical items are first. Clear anything you do not want.
migration.group.IrreplaceablePersonal.su: Unique data that formatting could permanently remove
migration.group.SecurityIdentity.title: Passwords and accounts
migration.group.SecurityIdentity.subtitl: Machine-bound credentials require export, sync, or sign-in
migration.group.AiCli.title: AI and command-line tools
migration.group.AiCli.subtitle: Prompts, settings, memories, and tool configuration
migration.group.DevConfigEditors.title: Developer tools and editors
migration.group.DevConfigEditors.subtitl: Settings move; programs may need reinstalling
migration.group.GameSaves.title: Game saves
migration.group.GameSaves.subtitle: Local progress that may not exist in the cloud
migration.group.Browsers.title: Browsers
migration.group.Browsers.subtitle: Bookmarks and settings may move; passwords may not
migration.group.ListSettingDumps.title: Program lists and settings
migration.group.ListSettingDumps.subtitl: Inventory and configuration for rebuilding the PC
migration.group.DetectedUnrecognized.sub: Nothing is hidden; review these manually
migration.item.defaultDescription: Review this item before including it.
migration.item.reason.lockedNow.generic: in use - close the app and re-scan
migration.item.forced: Selected to prevent silent data loss
migration.preview.title: Exact command preview
migration.preview.body: Preview-only strings are generated from the selection. No copy or restore runs here.
migration.manual.title: Manual steps for the new PC
migration.manual.body: Items that cannot be restored are kept in this explicit checklist.
migration.capture.title: Back up the selected items
migration.capture.destination: Choose a destination outside the app folder. The dry-run plan below is what you approve.
migration.capture.approve: I reviewed this capture plan — approve
migration.capture.outsideAppWarning: The destination must be a valid local-drive folder outside the app folder.
